prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次为 9963→9066→22439→13320→12066。2023 年出现明显断档（约 22439 名），2024 年迅速回升至 13320 名，2025 年继续回暖至 12066 名，近两年呈稳步回升态势，2025 年基准约 12066 名；该校在黑龙江省物理类招生计划 2021–2022 年均为 78 人，2023 年 79 人，2024–2025 年均为 80 人；2026 年计划 82 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招 2 人（+2.5%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响温和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京林业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第 74–85 名区间，2026 年位列第 83 名，属于全国中上游水平；2026 年高考周期内学校声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风相关舆情；抖音热度排名第 51 位（较热），综合热度约 63.8 万，短视频曝光处于中等偏上水平；2024 年曾出现陕西文科投档线断档记录，但物理类近年未发现明显断档信号；风景园林学获评 A+（全国顶尖），是学校最具竞争力的王牌学科，与该校农林特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，社会关注度居高不下；黑龙江省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 16.7 万，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计约 17.2 万减少约 3%，考生规模小幅收缩，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 12066 名、2026 年计划小幅扩招 2.5%、本省考生总数减少约 3% 以及声誉偏负面等多重因素，扩招与考生减少效应大致抵消，声誉舆情对报考热度有轻微抑制作用。，结合考生规模收缩的利好微调，预测 2026 年物理类最低位次约 12217 名，区间 11717–12717 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 9963→9066→22439→13320→12066. A significant gap occurred in 2023 (approximately 22439th), quickly rebounding to 13320th in 2024, and continuing to recover to 12066th in 2025, showing a steady upward trend in recent two years, with a baseline of about 12066th in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province was 78 students in 2021–2022, 79 in 2023, and 80 in 2024–2025. The 2026 plan is 82 students, a slight expansion of 2 students (+2.5%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science China University Ranking has been stable in the 74–85 range in recent years, ranking 83rd in 2026, at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics-related public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 51st (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 638,000, and short video exposure at an upper-middle level. In 2024, there was a record of a gap in the liberal arts admission line in Shaanxi, but no obvious gap signal has been found for Physics Category in recent years. Landscape Architecture is rated A+ (top in the country), the most competitive ace discipline, highly consistent with the university's forestry characteristics, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, with sustained high social attention. The total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3% from the combined total of about 172,000 for Physics and History categories in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 12066th, a slight 2.5% expansion in the 2026 plan, a reduction of about 3% in the total number of local examinees, and a slightly negative reputation, the expansion and examinee reduction effects roughly offset, with reputation public opinion having a slight inhibitory effect on application popularity. Combined with the favorable adjustment of the shrinking examinee scale, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 12217th, with a range of 11717–12717th.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 11700), prioritize competitive engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (around 12700), consider the university's characteristic advantageous majors such as Landscape Architecture and Forestry Engineering in Tier 2.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 1719 名、2026 年计划缩招 9.1%、本省考生总数减少约 3% 以及声誉偏负面等因素，缩招对位次的上推效应（位次数字减小）较为明显，但考生减少和声誉舆情有一定抵消作用。，结合缩招力度大于考生减少幅度以及文科专业热度偏冷的综合判断，微调后预测 2026 年历史类最低位次约 1645 名，区间 1349–1941 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Arts/History Category were 1426→1563→1702→1887→1719 respectively. Overall, there is a slow backward trend, with a year-by-year decline from 2021 to 2024, and a slight rebound to 1719 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past five years is about 460 places, with a baseline of approximately 1719 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Arts/History Category in Heilongjiang Province was 9 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 11 students in 2024–2025, and is planned to be 10 students in 2026, a reduction of 1 student (-9.1%) compared to 2025. The reduction is relatively significant, theoretically intensifying competition (decreasing ranking number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 83rd, with stable rankings in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and style public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 51st (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 638,000. In 2024, there was a record of a sudden drop in the Shaanxi Arts admission line from 2000 to 10,000, but no similar anomaly has occurred in Heilongjiang's History Category in recent years. Landscape Architecture (A+) is the university's top discipline, but the majors enrolled in Arts/History Category are mainly Business Administration, International Economics and Trade, Japanese, etc., with low correlation to the A+ discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Business Administration is clearly discouraged, with fierce employment competition. International Economics and Trade belongs to the Finance/Economics/Economic major category, with divided social popularity and wait-and-see attitude. The total number of candidates for the 2026 ordinary college entrance examination in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3% compared to 2025, with a slight contraction in the candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1719, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of 9.1%, the decrease in the number of local candidates by about 3%, and the somewhat negative reputation, the upward effect of the enrollment reduction on ranking (decreasing ranking number) is relatively significant, but the decrease in candidates and reputation public opinion have some offsetting effect. Combining the fact that the reduction intensity is greater than the decrease in candidates and the relatively cold popularity of Arts majors, after fine-tuning, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 History Category is approximately 1645, with a range of 1349–1941.
